Hero.name: OpenSyria
Hero.slogan: A public data commons for a clearer, more accountable Syria.

HomeDatasets.description: Download source-backed datasets or use the public API for Syrian administrative geography, localities, universities, and reusable civic reference data.
HomeDatasets.title: Syrian datasets for maps, research, journalism, and civic tools

Datasets.catalogDescription: Browse OpenSyria datasets for Syrian cities, governorates, districts, subdistricts, localities, universities, and other public reference data. Each dataset links to its GitHub repository, release downloads, and documented API routes.
Datasets.catalogTitle: Syrian public datasets for maps, research, and civic tools
Datasets.reuseDescription: OpenSyria publishes public, non-personal, source-backed reference data. Check each repository license before reusing release artifacts in production.

NotFoundPage.description: We could not find that OpenSyria page. The dataset catalog and homepage are still available.
NotFoundPage.title: This page is not available

Error.description: The page hit an unexpected problem. You can try loading it again or return home.
Error.title: Something went wrong
